4909FileSpec TargetProperties::GetSaveJITObjectsDir() const {
4910 const uint32_t idx = ePropertySaveObjectsDir;
4911 return GetPropertyAtIndexAs<FileSpec>(idx, {});
4912}
4913
4914void TargetProperties::CheckJITObjectsDir() {
4915 FileSpec new_dir = GetSaveJITObjectsDir();
4916 if (!new_dir)
4917 return;
4918
4919 const FileSystem &instance = FileSystem::Instance();
4920 bool exists = instance.Exists(new_dir);
4921 bool is_directory = instance.IsDirectory(new_dir);
4922 std::string path = new_dir.GetPath(true);
4923 bool writable = llvm::sys::fs::can_write(path);
4924 if (exists && is_directory && writable)
4925 return;
4926
4927 m_collection_sp->GetPropertyAtIndex(ePropertySaveObjectsDir)
4928 ->GetValue()
4929 ->Clear();
4930
4931 std::string buffer;
4932 llvm::raw_string_ostream os(buffer);
4933 os << "JIT object dir '" << path << "' ";
4934 if (!exists)
4935 os << "does not exist";
4936 else if (!is_directory)
4937 os << "is not a directory";
4938 else if (!writable)
4939 os << "is not writable";
4940
4941 std::optional<lldb::user_id_t> debugger_id;
4942 if (m_target)
4943 debugger_id = m_target->GetDebugger().GetID();
4944 Debugger::ReportError(buffer, debugger_id);
4945}

5027llvm::StringRef TargetProperties::GetExpressionPrefixContents() {
5028 const uint32_t idx = ePropertyExprPrefix;
5029 OptionValueFileSpec *file =
5030 m_collection_sp->GetPropertyAtIndexAsOptionValueFileSpec(idx);
5031 if (file) {
5032 DataBufferSP data_sp(file->GetFileContents());
5033 if (data_sp)
5034 return llvm::StringRef(
5035 reinterpret_cast<const char *>(data_sp->GetBytes()),
5036 data_sp->GetByteSize());
5037 }
5038 return "";
5039}

5148
5149const ProcessLaunchInfo &TargetProperties::GetProcessLaunchInfo() const {
5150 return m_launch_info;
5151}
5152
5153void TargetProperties::SetProcessLaunchInfo(
5154 const ProcessLaunchInfo &launch_info) {
5155 m_launch_info = launch_info;
5156 SetArg0(launch_info.GetArg0());
5157 SetRunArguments(launch_info.GetArguments());
5158 SetEnvironment(launch_info.GetEnvironment());
5159 const FileAction *input_file_action =
5160 launch_info.GetFileActionForFD(STDIN_FILENO);
5161 if (input_file_action) {
5162 SetStandardInputPath(input_file_action->GetFileSpec().GetPath());
5163 }
5164 const FileAction *output_file_action =
5165 launch_info.GetFileActionForFD(STDOUT_FILENO);
5166 if (output_file_action) {
5167 SetStandardOutputPath(output_file_action->GetFileSpec().GetPath());
5168 }
5169 const FileAction *error_file_action =
5170 launch_info.GetFileActionForFD(STDERR_FILENO);
5171 if (error_file_action) {
5172 SetStandardErrorPath(error_file_action->GetFileSpec().GetPath());
5173 }
5174 SetDetachOnError(launch_info.GetFlags().Test(lldb::eLaunchFlagDetachOnError));
5175 SetDisableASLR(launch_info.GetFlags().Test(lldb::eLaunchFlagDisableASLR));
5176 SetInheritTCC(
5177 launch_info.GetFlags().Test(lldb::eLaunchFlagInheritTCCFromParent));
5178 SetDisableSTDIO(launch_info.GetFlags().Test(lldb::eLaunchFlagDisableSTDIO));
5179}
5180
5181bool TargetProperties::GetRequireHardwareBreakpoints() const {
5182 const uint32_t idx = ePropertyRequireHardwareBreakpoints;

5187void TargetProperties::SetRequireHardwareBreakpoints(bool b) {

5189 m_collection_sp->SetPropertyAtIndex(idx, b);

5196}
5197
5198void TargetProperties::Arg0ValueChangedCallback() {
5199 m_launch_info.SetArg0(GetArg0());
5200}
5201
5202void TargetProperties::RunArgsValueChangedCallback() {
5203 Args args;
5204 if (GetRunArguments(args))
5205 m_launch_info.GetArguments() = args;
5206}
5207
5208void TargetProperties::EnvVarsValueChangedCallback() {
5209 m_launch_info.GetEnvironment() = ComputeEnvironment();
5210}
5211
5212void TargetProperties::InputPathValueChangedCallback() {
5213 m_launch_info.AppendOpenFileAction(STDIN_FILENO, GetStandardInputPath(), true,
5214 false);
5215}
5216
5217void TargetProperties::OutputPathValueChangedCallback() {
5218 m_launch_info.AppendOpenFileAction(STDOUT_FILENO, GetStandardOutputPath(),
5219 false, true);
5220}
5221
5222void TargetProperties::ErrorPathValueChangedCallback() {
5223 m_launch_info.AppendOpenFileAction(STDERR_FILENO, GetStandardErrorPath(),
5224 false, true);
5225}
5226
5227void TargetProperties::DetachOnErrorValueChangedCallback() {
5228 if (GetDetachOnError())
5229 m_launch_info.GetFlags().Set(lldb::eLaunchFlagDetachOnError);
5230 else
5231 m_launch_info.GetFlags().Clear(lldb::eLaunchFlagDetachOnError);
5232}
5233
5234void TargetProperties::DisableASLRValueChangedCallback() {
5235 if (GetDisableASLR())
5236 m_launch_info.GetFlags().Set(lldb::eLaunchFlagDisableASLR);
5237 else
5238 m_launch_info.GetFlags().Clear(lldb::eLaunchFlagDisableASLR);
5239}
5240
5241void TargetProperties::InheritTCCValueChangedCallback() {
5242 if (GetInheritTCC())
5243 m_launch_info.GetFlags().Set(lldb::eLaunchFlagInheritTCCFromParent);
5244 else
5245 m_launch_info.GetFlags().Clear(lldb::eLaunchFlagInheritTCCFromParent);
5246}
5247
5248void TargetProperties::DisableSTDIOValueChangedCallback() {
5249 if (GetDisableSTDIO())
5250 m_launch_info.GetFlags().Set(lldb::eLaunchFlagDisableSTDIO);
5251 else
5252 m_launch_info.GetFlags().Clear(lldb::eLaunchFlagDisableSTDIO);
5253}

5259}

5261void TargetProperties::SetDebugUtilityExpression(bool debug) {
5262 const uint32_t idx = ePropertyDebugUtilityExpression;
5263 SetPropertyAtIndex(idx, debug);
5264}
5265
5266// Target::TargetEventData
5267
5268Target::TargetEventData::TargetEventData(const lldb::TargetSP &target_sp)
5269 : EventData(), m_target_sp(target_sp), m_module_list() {}
5270
5271Target::TargetEventData::TargetEventData(const lldb::TargetSP &target_sp,
5272 const ModuleList &module_list)
5273 : EventData(), m_target_sp(target_sp), m_module_list(module_list) {}
5274
5275Target::TargetEventData::TargetEventData(
5276 const lldb::TargetSP &target_sp, const lldb::TargetSP &created_target_sp)
5277 : EventData(), m_target_sp(target_sp),
5278 m_created_target_sp(created_target_sp), m_module_list() {}
5279
5280Target::TargetEventData::~TargetEventData() = default;
5281
5282llvm::StringRef Target::TargetEventData::GetFlavorString() {
5283 return "Target::TargetEventData";
5284}
5285
5286void Target::TargetEventData::Dump(Stream *s) const {
5287 for (size_t i = 0; i < m_module_list.GetSize(); ++i) {
5288 if (i != 0)
5289 *s << ", ";
5290 m_module_list.GetModuleAtIndex(i)->GetDescription(
5291 s->AsRawOstream(), lldb::eDescriptionLevelBrief);
5292 }
5293}
5294
5295const Target::TargetEventData *
5296Target::TargetEventData::GetEventDataFromEvent(const Event *event_ptr) {
5297 if (event_ptr) {
5298 const EventData *event_data = event_ptr->GetData();
5299 if (event_data &&
5300 event_data->GetFlavor() == TargetEventData::GetFlavorString())
5301 return static_cast<const TargetEventData *>(event_ptr->GetData());
5302 }
5303 return nullptr;
5304}
5305
5306TargetSP Target::TargetEventData::GetTargetFromEvent(const Event *event_ptr) {
5307 TargetSP target_sp;
5308 const TargetEventData *event_data = GetEventDataFromEvent(event_ptr);
5309 if (event_data)
5310 target_sp = event_data->m_target_sp;
5311 return target_sp;
5312}
5313
5314TargetSP
5315Target::TargetEventData::GetCreatedTargetFromEvent(const Event *event_ptr) {
5316 TargetSP created_target_sp;
5317 const TargetEventData *event_data = GetEventDataFromEvent(event_ptr);
5318 if (event_data)
5319 created_target_sp = event_data->m_created_target_sp;
5320 return created_target_sp;
5321}
5322
5323ModuleList
5324Target::TargetEventData::GetModuleListFromEvent(const Event *event_ptr) {
5325 ModuleList module_list;
5326 const TargetEventData *event_data = GetEventDataFromEvent(event_ptr);
5327 if (event_data)
5328 module_list = event_data->m_module_list;
5329 return module_list;
5330}
5331
5332std::recursive_mutex &Target::GetAPIMutex() {
5333 if (GetProcessSP() && GetProcessSP()->CurrentThreadIsPrivateStateThread())
5334 return m_private_mutex;
5335 else
5336 return m_mutex;
5337}
5338
5339/// Get metrics associated with this target in JSON format.
5340llvm::json::Value
5341Target::ReportStatistics(const lldb_private::StatisticsOptions &options) {
5342 return m_stats.ToJSON(*this, options);
5343}
5344
5345void Target::ResetStatistics() { m_stats.Reset(*this); }
5346
5347bool Target::HasLoadedSections() { return !GetSectionLoadList().IsEmpty(); }
5348
5349lldb::addr_t Target::GetSectionLoadAddress(const lldb::SectionSP &section_sp) {
5350 return GetSectionLoadList().GetSectionLoadAddress(section_sp);
5351}
5352
5353void Target::ClearSectionLoadList() { GetSectionLoadList().Clear(); }
5354
5355void Target::DumpSectionLoadList(Stream &s) {
5356 GetSectionLoadList().Dump(s, this);
5357}
5358
5359void Target::NotifyBreakpointChanged(Breakpoint &bp,
5360 lldb::BreakpointEventType eventKind) {
5361 if (EventTypeHasListeners(Target::eBroadcastBitBreakpointChanged)) {
5362 std::shared_ptr<Breakpoint::BreakpointEventData> data_sp =
5363 std::make_shared<Breakpoint::BreakpointEventData>(
5364 eventKind, bp.shared_from_this());
5365 BroadcastEvent(Target::eBroadcastBitBreakpointChanged, data_sp);
5366 }
5367}
5368
5369void Target::NotifyBreakpointChanged(
5370 Breakpoint &bp, const lldb::EventDataSP &breakpoint_data_sp) {
5371 if (EventTypeHasListeners(Target::eBroadcastBitBreakpointChanged))
5372 BroadcastEvent(Target::eBroadcastBitBreakpointChanged, breakpoint_data_sp);
5373}
5374
5375// FIXME: the language plugin should expression options dynamically and
5376// we should validate here (by asking the language plugin) that the options
5377// being set/retrieved are actually valid options.
5378
5379llvm::Error
5380EvaluateExpressionOptions::SetBooleanLanguageOption(llvm::StringRef option_name,
5381 bool value) {
5382 if (option_name.empty())
5383 return llvm::createStringError("can't set an option with an empty name");
5384
5385 if (StructuredData::ObjectSP existing_sp =
5386 GetLanguageOptions().GetValueForKey(option_name);
5387 existing_sp && existing_sp->GetType() != eStructuredDataTypeBoolean)
5388 return llvm::createStringErrorV("trying to override existing option '{0}' "
5389 "of type '{1}' with a boolean value",
5390 option_name, existing_sp->GetType());
5391
5392 GetLanguageOptions().AddBooleanItem(option_name, value);
5393
5394 return llvm::Error::success();
5395}
5396
5397llvm::Expected<bool> EvaluateExpressionOptions::GetBooleanLanguageOption(
5398 llvm::StringRef option_name) const {
5399 const StructuredData::Dictionary &opts = GetLanguageOptions();
5400
5401 if (!opts.HasKey(option_name))
5402 return llvm::createStringErrorV("option '{0}' does not exist", option_name);
5403
5404 bool result;
5405 if (!opts.GetValueForKeyAsBoolean(option_name, result))
5406 return llvm::createStringErrorV("failed to get option '{0}' as boolean",
5407 option_name);
5408
5409 return result;
5410}
5411
5412const StructuredData::Dictionary &
5413EvaluateExpressionOptions::GetLanguageOptions() const {
5414 assert(m_language_options_sp);
5415
5416 return *m_language_options_sp;
5417}
5418
5419StructuredData::Dictionary &EvaluateExpressionOptions::GetLanguageOptions() {
5420 assert(m_language_options_sp);
5421
5422 return *m_language_options_sp;
5423}
5424
5425// FIXME: this option is C++ plugin specific and should be registered by it,
5426// instead of hard-coding it here.
5427constexpr llvm::StringLiteral s_cpp_ignore_context_qualifiers_option =
5428 "c++-ignore-context-qualifiers";
5429
5430EvaluateExpressionOptions::EvaluateExpressionOptions()
5431 : m_language_options_sp(std::make_shared<StructuredData::Dictionary>()) {
5432 SetCppIgnoreContextQualifiers(false);
5433}
5434
5435void EvaluateExpressionOptions::SetCppIgnoreContextQualifiers(bool value) {
5436 llvm::cantFail(
5437 SetBooleanLanguageOption(s_cpp_ignore_context_qualifiers_option, value));
5438}
5439
5440bool EvaluateExpressionOptions::GetCppIgnoreContextQualifiers() const {
5441 return llvm::cantFail(
5442 GetBooleanLanguageOption(s_cpp_ignore_context_qualifiers_option));
5443}
